roles.name: Product Manager
roles.description: Reviews user value, scope, problem framing, acceptance criteria, prioritization, and lifecycle readiness.
roles.boundary: Owns product clarity and decision quality, not technical implementation details.

roles.name: AI Product Strategist
roles.description: Reviews whether AI is necessary, useful, differentiated, measurable, and aligned with user trust.
roles.boundary: Owns AI product value and user trust, not low-level model implementation.

roles.name: Interaction / UX Reviewer
roles.description: Reviews interaction clarity, workflow ergonomics, information architecture, states, and accessibility expectations.
roles.boundary: Owns user interaction quality, not brand strategy or implementation architecture.

roles.name: Software Architect
roles.description: Reviews system boundaries, data flow, dependencies, contracts, scalability, and technical risk.
roles.boundary: Owns system structure and technical trade-offs, not product desirability.

roles.name: Agent / Workflow Architect
roles.description: Reviews agent responsibilities, tool use, control flow, state, handoffs, autonomy boundaries, and recovery paths.
roles.boundary: Owns agent and workflow structure, not general product positioning.

roles.name: Developer Reviewer
roles.description: Reviews code change quality, maintainability, local correctness, tests, and integration risk.
roles.boundary: Owns code-level quality, not broad architecture unless the change violates boundaries.

roles.name: Evaluation Engineer
roles.description: Reviews AI evaluation design, datasets, metrics, regression strategy, and quality gates.
roles.boundary: Owns AI quality measurement, not product positioning or infrastructure reliability.

roles.name: QA Engineer
roles.description: Reviews test strategy, regression scope, acceptance coverage, edge cases, and release confidence.
roles.boundary: Owns validation confidence, not code implementation style except where it affects testability.

roles.name: Security Reviewer
roles.description: Reviews authentication, authorization, secret handling, attack surface, supply chain, and abuse risk.
roles.boundary: Owns security risk, not general privacy policy unless it affects attack surface.

roles.name: Privacy Reviewer
roles.description: Reviews personal data handling, data minimization, retention, consent, sensitive data, and privacy risk.
roles.boundary: Owns privacy and data protection risk, not general security controls unless they protect personal data.

roles.name: Performance Reviewer
roles.description: Reviews latency, throughput, resource use, frontend performance, backend scaling, and model cost.
roles.boundary: Owns performance and cost efficiency, not broad reliability unless performance affects availability.

roles.name: Reliability Reviewer
roles.description: Reviews failure modes, retries, idempotency, degradation, observability, recovery, and operational readiness.
roles.boundary: Owns resilience and operations, not product market fit.

roles.name: Marketing Strategist
roles.description: Reviews messaging, audience segmentation, campaign readiness, channels, positioning, and launch communication.
roles.boundary: Owns market communication strategy, not sales process or product requirements.

roles.name: Market Research Analyst
roles.description: Reviews market assumptions, customer segments, competitive landscape, demand evidence, and category dynamics.
roles.boundary: Owns market evidence quality, not campaign execution.

roles.name: Growth Strategist
roles.description: Reviews acquisition, activation, retention, referral, monetization loops, experiments, and growth constraints.
roles.boundary: Owns growth motion and experiment quality, not product correctness or compliance approval.

roles.name: Sales / GTM Reviewer
roles.description: Reviews go-to-market readiness, sales motion, buyer personas, objection handling, packaging, and enablement.
roles.boundary: Owns sales and GTM readiness, not marketing creative or technical implementation.

roles.name: Legal / Compliance Reviewer
roles.description: Reviews regulatory exposure, contractual obligations, policy constraints, compliance evidence, and approval needs.
roles.boundary: Owns legal and compliance risk signals, not formal legal advice.

roles.name: Finance / Pricing Reviewer
roles.description: Reviews pricing logic, cost structure, margin risk, packaging economics, model cost, and business viability.
roles.boundary: Owns pricing and business economics, not sales execution or performance engineering details.
